entry.title: New: BFED-105 Bill 140 (2024) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
BILL 140 (2024), AUTHORIZING THE MAYOR TO ENTER INTO AN INTERGOVERNMENTAL AGREEMENT WITH 15TH SPACE SURVEILLANCE SQUADRON, AIR FORCE MAUI OPTICAL & SUPERCOMPUTING, AND AIR FORCE RESEARCH LABORATORY FOR FIRE AND EMERGENCY/NON-EMERGENCY SERVICES (BFED-105)

Budget, Finance, and Economic Development Committee (2023-2025)

View on the council site
